hulls.name: Colony Barge
hulls.description: The original hull. Slow, spacious, held together by tradition.

hulls.name: Light Corvette Refit
hulls.description: A leaner spaceframe conversion. Less room, better bones.

hulls.name: Generation Ark Expansion
hulls.description: Hull segments grafted on over decades. A city that flies.

engines.name: Ion Drive
engines.description: Reliable, efficient, and slower than continental drift.

engines.name: Fusion Torch
engines.description: Cuts a decade off a crossing, if the fuel holds.

engines.name: Ramscoop Array
engines.description: Harvests fuel in transit. The long-haul choice.

weapons.name: Point Defense Grid
weapons.description: Keeps the debris and the desperate at a distance.

weapons.name: Pulse Cannon
weapons.description: A deterrent with a paper trail.
